library.name: net/http
library.notes: Go standard library HTTP client target.

url.scheme.message: Target only supports HTTP(S) request URLs.

body.multipart.message: net/http can construct multipart request bodies.

cookies.jar.message: Cookie jar files require generated helper loading for net/http cookie jars.
cookies.jar.requiredRuntime: Filesystem access to the referenced cookie jar file.

tls.verify.message: net/http transports support TLS verification settings.

tls.ca.message: go.net_http can load CA files into a tls.Config RootCAs pool.

tls.client-cert.message: go.net_http can load client certificates into tls.Config Certificates.

network.message: go.net_http requires custom DialContext wiring to preserve curl network binding or connection routing.

dns.message: go.net_http requires custom DialContext wiring to preserve curl DNS resolver overrides.

redirects.message: net/http clients support redirect policy callbacks.

timeout.message: net/http clients and contexts support timeouts.

http.version.2.message: net/http can use HTTP/2 with transport configuration; prior knowledge is lossy without custom transport wiring.

http.version.3.message: net/http does not provide built-in HTTP/3 client behavior.

debug.message: net/http output cannot reproduce curl verbose or trace wire dumps.

external-ref.message: Generated code must provide runtime handling for external references.
external-ref.requiredRuntime: Filesystem or stdin access to referenced inputs.
